name: Brown Classic
description: The Brown Classic is designed for everyday comfort. Featuring a rich tan leather finish and an anti-slip sole, this versatile pair blends seamlessly with casual or semi-formal attire.
care: Wipe with a clean, dry cloth. Do not machine wash.

name: Eco White
description: Sleek and sustainable. The Eco White brings minimalist aesthetics to your formal wear while utilizing sustainably sourced vegan leather.
care: Use gentle leather cleaner. Keep away from extreme heat.

name: Urban Rider
description: Built for the streets. The Urban Rider focuses on durability and style with reinforced stitching and a breathable mesh upper for all-day comfort.

name: Cloud Walk
description: Experience zero gravity. The Cloud Walk running shoe features ultra-light bouncy soles that absorb impact, making every run feel effortless.
care: Machine wash cold on gentle cycle.

name: Vintage Tan
description: A nod to retro styling. The Vintage Tan offers timeless appeal with modern construction techniques, perfect for weekend outings.
care: Brush off regular dust. Use suede protector.

name: Executive White
description: The peak of luxury. These pristine white formal shoes are meticulously handcrafted for the modern executive who demands perfection.

name: Street Smart
description: Light, agile, and fiercely stylish. The Street Smart sneaker adapts to fast-paced city life with a flexible sole and striking color accents.

name: Marathon Pro
description: Engineered for distance. Marathon Pro provides superior arch support and a carbon-fiber plate for maximum energy return.

name: Weekend Vibe
description: Kick back in style. The Weekend Vibe slip-on guarantees stress-free styling and plush interior comfort.

name: Signature Series
description: A collector's dream. Limited availability and unparalleled craftsmanship make the Signature Series the ultimate statement piece.

name: Retro Classic
description: Straight out of the 90s. The Retro Classic revives bold silhouettes and chunky profiles for the aesthetically bold.

name: Ultra Boost
description: Unmatched energy. The Ultra Boost utilizes cutting-edge midsole technology to propel you forward with every step.
care: Rinse sole with water. Air dry.
